sounds.name: rifle
sounds.desc: Single dry assault-rifle shot — sharp, punchy crack

sounds.name: rifle2
sounds.desc: Assault-rifle shot (variation 2) — alternated with rifle for firing variety

sounds.name: smg
sounds.desc: ONE single submachine-gun shot — a single round, snappy, not a burst or full-auto

sounds.name: pistol
sounds.desc: Single handgun gunshot — tight metallic crack with a hint of slide clack, close and dry

sounds.name: shotgun
sounds.desc: Pump shotgun — deep boom blast, then a pump-action rack cocking the next shell (cha-chunk)

sounds.name: autocannon
sounds.desc: Heavy autocannon — mechanical metallic boom

sounds.name: rail
sounds.desc: Railgun — electric snap into a descending energy zap

sounds.name: rocket
sounds.desc: Rocket launch — ignition whoosh with a deep motor rumble

sounds.name: thump
sounds.desc: Grenade launcher — hollow low launch pop

sounds.name: cannon
sounds.desc: Tank 120mm — huge crack then deep booming concussion

sounds.name: plasma
sounds.desc: Plasma bolt — synthetic electric 'zwip'

sounds.name: flame
sounds.desc: Flamethrower — roaring gas ignition whoosh

sounds.name: acid
sounds.desc: Acid spit — wet gooey organic splat

sounds.name: repair
sounds.desc: Repair tool — ratcheting mechanical whir and clank

sounds.name: heal
sounds.desc: Healing beam — warm rising restorative shimmer

sounds.name: claw
sounds.desc: Claw swipe — fast whoosh and flesh slash

sounds.name: hit
sounds.desc: Bullet impact on armor — dull dry thwack

sounds.name: hitmarker
sounds.desc: UI hit tick — crisp confirmation blip

sounds.name: explosion
sounds.desc: Explosion — sharp crack then rumbling debris

sounds.name: explosion_big
sounds.desc: Huge explosion — deep concussion, long collapse

sounds.name: death
sounds.desc: Generic death — higher-pitched pained cry and gurgle, fading out (zombies / fallback)

sounds.name: death_infantry
sounds.desc: Infantry death — short pained male grunt + gear rattle

sounds.name: death_heavy
sounds.desc: Heavy death — deep pained groan + armor clang

sounds.name: death_jump
sounds.desc: Jump Trooper death — yelp mid-fall + jetpack sputter

sounds.name: death_engineer
sounds.desc: Engineer death — grunt + tools clattering down

sounds.name: death_medic
sounds.desc: Medic death — gasp + failing medical tone

sounds.name: death_infiltrator
sounds.desc: Infiltrator death — sharp gasp + cloak fizzle

sounds.name: death_pathfinder
sounds.desc: Pathfinder death — cry + warp zip snapping out

sounds.name: death_ghost
sounds.desc: Ghost death — grunt + comms static cutting out

sounds.name: jetpack
sounds.desc: Jetpack thrust burst — strong roaring rocket exhaust with a sharp pressurized hiss, punchy and full, close and loud

sounds.name: cloak
sounds.desc: Cloak toggle — shimmering phase whoosh

sounds.name: reload
sounds.desc: Reload — mag out, mag in, bolt charge

sounds.name: pickup
sounds.desc: Pickup — short bright positive collect blip

sounds.name: engine
sounds.desc: Vehicle engine — low diesel idle rumble

sounds.name: mine_plant
sounds.desc: Mine plant — mechanical arming click and beep

sounds.name: turret_built
sounds.desc: Turret deploy — unfolding servo whir and lock

sounds.name: footstep
sounds.desc: Single boot footstep on dirt

sounds.name: growl
sounds.desc: Zombie growl — low guttural snarl

sounds.name: growl2
sounds.desc: Zombie growl (variation 2) — different throat, wetter snarl

sounds.name: growl3
sounds.desc: Zombie growl (variation 3) — higher, rasping moan

sounds.name: impulse
sounds.desc: Impulse cannon — deep pulsing knockback whump

sounds.name: warp
sounds.desc: Warp teleport — rising shimmer and pop

sounds.name: blink
sounds.desc: Blink — quick phase whoosh

sounds.name: emp_burst
sounds.desc: EMP burst — electrical crackle and low thump

sounds.name: gravlift
sounds.desc: Grav lift — rising anti-gravity whoosh

sounds.name: beacon
sounds.desc: Beacon deploy — soft electronic ping and hum

sounds.name: orbital_charge
sounds.desc: Orbital strike charge — ominous rising energy hum

sounds.name: drone_static
sounds.desc: Radio static burst — harsh white-noise crackle, a control link breaking up

sounds.name: drone_crash
sounds.desc: Small quadcopter drone crashing to the ground — rotor snap, plastic thud, debris scatter

sounds.name: flag_taken
sounds.desc: Flag stolen — tense short alarm stinger

sounds.name: flag_captured
sounds.desc: Flag captured — bright triumphant chime

sounds.name: flag_returned
sounds.desc: Flag returned — clean neutral chime

sounds.name: point_captured
sounds.desc: Point captured — confident synth flourish

sounds.name: wave_start
sounds.desc: Wave incoming — low horn swell + alarm

sounds.name: victory
sounds.desc: Victory — triumphant brass flourish

sounds.name: defeat
sounds.desc: Defeat — somber descending tone

sounds.name: ui_click
sounds.desc: Menu click — tiny crisp tick

sounds.name: spawn
sounds.desc: Respawn — short rising materialize shimmer

sounds.name: footstep_grass
sounds.desc: ONE single boot step on dry grass and dirt — soft crunch, organic, no reverb

sounds.name: footstep_metal
sounds.desc: ONE single boot step on a steel deck plate — hard metallic clank, short ring

sounds.name: footstep_rock
sounds.desc: ONE single boot step on loose mine rubble and gravel — gritty scrape-crunch

sounds.name: footstep_ice
sounds.desc: ONE single boot step on hard ice — glassy tap with a faint slide squeak

sounds.name: footstep_grit
sounds.desc: ONE single boot step on a gritty sand-dusted road — dry granular crunch

sounds.name: amb_savanna
sounds.desc: Dry savanna wind through grass, distant insects, very sparse far bird — steady loopable bed, no melody

sounds.name: amb_starship
sounds.desc: Starship interior hum — low engine drone, faint ventilation hiss, occasional soft metal tick — loopable bed

sounds.name: amb_asteroid
sounds.desc: Deep mine ambience — cavernous low rumble, distant rock settling, faint machinery echo — loopable bed

sounds.name: amb_europa
sounds.desc: Underwater dome ambience — muffled ocean pressure, slow water movement, deep groaning ice above — loopable bed

sounds.name: amb_titan
sounds.desc: Alien colony exterior — thick methane wind, distant industrial hum, muffled atmosphere — loopable bed

sounds.name: amb_triton
sounds.desc: Polar ice station — thin howling wind, creaking ice sheets, extreme desolate cold — loopable bed
